candidate_definition_hints.text: Finetuning and inference tools for the CogView4 and CogVideoX model series.

CogKit is an open-source project that provides a user-friendly interface for researchers and developers to utilize models from ZhipuAI, currently supports [CogView](https://huggingface.co/collections/THUDM/cogview-67ac3f241eefad2af015669b) (image generation) and [CogVideoX](http…
